raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "5. Un tas KUNGS juhfu
Deews pats iṡdsihś tohs juhfu
Preekschâ/ un nodsihś tohs no
juhs/ un juhs eemanto-teet wiṙ-
nu Semmi/ ittin ka tas KUNgs
juhsu Deews us jums ruñajs irr.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "6. Tad nu stiprinajtees fohti/
turredami/ un darridami wiṡsu/
kas rakstihś irr tai Grahnata/
tahs Mohsus Bauflibas/ ka juhs
no tahs ne atkahpjaṫ/ ne pa lab-
bo/ nedś pa kreifo Rohku.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "7. Ka juhs ne no-eetat pee
fehahm Tautahm/ kas pee jums
irr atliktuschas / ne peeminneet
arridsan winno Deewu Wahr-
du/ ne laideet arrī pee winneem
swehreht / un ne kalpojeet win-
neem/ un ne klannijeetees preeksch
winneem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "8. Bet tam KUNGAM juh-
fam Deewam buhs jums pee-
kehrtées/ ittin ka juhs effat dar-
rijscht lihds tchodēen.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "9. Tasdsihś tas KUNGS no
juhsu Preekschas leelas uu warre-
nas Tautas/ ne weens irr preeksch
jums pastahweis lihds chodeen.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "10. Weens Wihrs no jums
aisdsihś tuhkstofchus / jo tas
KUNGS juhsu Deews irr tas/
kas preeksch jums karro/ ittin ka
wiṙsch jums runnajs irr,
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "11. Tapehz fargajt juhfa
Dwehfeles tohti/ka juhs to KUN
Gu juhsu Deewu unthlojat.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "12. Jo kad juhs atgreesifee
tees / un preekhrsitees schah-
Tautahm/ kas pee jums atlikt-
schas / un apfwainoseetces a
winnahm / un eefect pee wiṙ-
nahm / un tahs pee jums.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "13. Tad sinnajt teescham/
tas KUNGS juhsu Deews ju
prohjam wiṙras schahs Tanta
juhsu Preekschâ ue iṡdsihś/ be
tahs tieś jums par Slasda-Wa
qu/ un par Tihkli/ un par Pal-
tagu juhfōs Sabnds / un pa
Ehrkschkeem juhfas Azzis / te-
kams juhs bohja eefect no tcha-
labbas Semmes/ ko tas KUNG-
juhsu Deews jums dewis irr.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "14. Un raugi/ es eenuu to Je-
fu wiṙras Bajaules/ un juhs si-
nat no wiṙras juhfas Sirdeś/ u-
no wiṙras juhfas Dwehfeles/
ne weens Wahrdś truhkst / n-
wifteem labbeem Wahrdeem /
tas KUNGS juhsu Deew-
us jums runnajs irr / wiṙri i-
jums nahkutchi/no teein ne truh-
ne weens Wahrdś.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "15. Un ka wiṙs tas Labbum-
pahr jums irr nahzis / ko ta-
KUNGS juhsu Deewg us jums
runnajs irr/ ta likś tas KUNG-
juhsu Deews us jums nahkt wi-
fu to Laununu/ teekains wiṙ-
juhs buhs nomaitajs no tcha-
labbas Semmes Wirtus/ ko ta-
KUNGS juhtu Deews jums
dewis irr.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
